text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to start training, but I don't see Mejiro
Palmer anywhere, so I decide to go looking for
her.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You're super duper awesome at digging
holes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Good, aren't I? How about we connect the
tunnels next?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Trainer. This girl was bored outta her
mind, so we're digging tunnels together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Since you're here anyway, wanna join in?
choice_data_list: Have you forgotten you have training today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omigosh! I'm so sorry! It totally slipped my mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her kindness toward the girl warms my
heart, I still warn her not to forget about our
training sessions so easily next time.
